name: Aunt Sadie's Savory Kugel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain 1 very large onion, finely diced. Traditionally, my Aunt Sadie Jean Greenfield Gibrich sautéed the onion in 1 cup of rendered chicken fat until clear but not brown.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Spread the cooked noodles in a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
4. Add the onions, sour cream, eggs, salt, and pepper to the noodles.
5. Transfer the mixture to the prepared casserole dish.
6. Bake for about 40 minutes, or until set and lightly browned on top.
7. Serve with brisket of beef and sweet & sour red cabbage.
